title: gleam_otp supervisor support — gleam_otp_external + end-to-end test
purpose: Implement gleam_otp_external stubs, fill remaining BIF gaps, and prove supervision works end-to-end with a Gleam supervisor + worker test.
task: Stub gleam_otp_external, fill BIF gaps, write end-to-end supervisor test.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement full OTP supervisor module
SHALL NOT implement OTP application controllers
SHALL NOT implement hot code upgrade

requirements.title: gleam_otp_external stubs
requirements.spec: application_stopped/0 returns ok. supervisor:start_link/2 returns {ok, self()}.
acceptance: No unresolved imports for gleam_otp modules

requirements.title: Remaining BIF gaps
requirements.spec: Implement erlang:++/2, length/1, pid_to_list/1, get/0, and any other BIFs discovered during integration.

requirements.title: End-to-end supervisor integration test
requirements.spec: Compile a Gleam supervisor+worker, load all modules, start supervisor, verify worker runs, crash worker, verify restart.
